title: ICanGamez COD Builder
description: This allows the functions to make Cod maps working to a degree!
body:
# Call of Duty Zombies

<details>
<summary>What does it do?</summary>

Adds functions on the game codz with multiplayer compatibility, Map not included

</details>

<details>
<summary>How to use?</summary>


Use it to build the back end of your codz maps,

Run command /function codz:admin

Recommended to use the resource pack
and to disable natural spawning


</details>

### What All the admin Items do:

Zombie Entry: Place above a doorway for zombies to walk to

Zombie Spawn: Place no more that ~30 blocks away from door

East West: This is a door breakable by zombies and repairable by players in the east west direction

South North: This is a door breakable by zombies and repairable by players in the north south direction

North/South/East/West No Entry: Teleports player who walks into the invisible armor stand away from that direction

Kill Button: Kills all Armorstands, Invisible entities in a 2 block radius

Box Placement: Spawns a box to get guns from

North South Buy Door: Spawns a door in said direction for players to buy [Cost 2000]

East West Buy Door: Spawns a door in said direction for players to buy [Cost 2000]

Light Lighting Placement: Spawns a light effected by lighting turning it on and off randomly

Progression Point 1/2/3: Place in a already placed BUY DOOR to buy and allow Zombie Spawn Progression 1/2/3 to spawn zombies

Zombie Spawn Progression 1/2/3: Spawns zombies when a buy door with a progression point of the same number is bought


<details>
<summary>How to play?</summary>

Play by Shifting near a North South / East West, Right clicking you gun to shoot it, and collecting rotten flesh to buy more guns at the Box Placement.
Shift to near Buy Door to unlock areas and new places.


</details>

<details>
<summary>QNA</summary>

Question: How do I Earn Coins?
Answer: By Collecting rotten flesh or Repairing a broken door from zombies

Question: how do I Get new guns?
Answer: Punch the box requires 2000 Coins.


Question: Why is the reloading stuck?
Answer: Could be a WIFI issue or your not holding the gun

Question: Why is the light not flashing?
Answer: There needs to be a lighting bolt for it to flash

Question: Why does the progression point say I unlocked a door
Answer: You need to place the door first then place the unlock entity in the door block

Question: Why can I Shoot though blocks?
Answer: Far away shots are hard to track so sometimes they pass right though blocks


</details>
